params.name: Dragonspine Medal
params.description:
On Aug 24, 235 BC, a group of uninvited guests intruded into the lair of the Abyssal Dragon.
The ogres in the Abyssal Valley were originally an extremely weak race, preyed upon by various powerful magical creatures until an ogre changed this situation. He crossed the Dragon Mountain, used cunning to sow discord between the dragons and the elves, and took advantage of the unguarded dragon nest to steal the Dragonspine Medal. On his escape, he even killed a dragon! However, the plot was soon ex …
